contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Tribo Bahia Mirim: 39 per-move clips published from Bico Duro's compiled videos
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/2
  
  Details:
  Pivoted from the original 209-raw-iPhone-clip plan after Whisper PT confirmed
  none of those files have intelligible spoken narration (no_speech_prob > 0.8
  across all samples; "Obrigado por assistir!" silence-hallucination signature).
  
  Switched to processing the 2 pre-compiled TrueSight DAO YouTube instructional
  videos that already exist on admin@truesight.me:
  - cqKMvYbB1Kw (beginner curriculum, 10 min)
  - zLPVWP5WQOg (intermediate rolê-drill, 13.6 min)
  
  Pipeline:
  1. yt-dlp both videos
  2. faster-whisper PT word-level transcription to find every move-name announcement
  3. ffmpeg cuts → 39 per-move clips in tribomirimbahia/data/compiled_clips/
  4. Claude-drafted EN translations + curriculum-faithful 1-2 sentence summaries per move
  5. Re-uploaded all 39 as PUBLIC videos on admin@truesight.me (reused OAuth from
     agroverse_shop/scripts/youtube_credentials.json + token.json — no re-auth needed)
  
  39/39 uploaded with zero errors. data/moves.json is now Phase 1A complete (spec §3
  schema) with youtube_clip_url populated for all moves, ready for the Phase 2
  practice-tool site build at capoeira.agroverse.shop.
  
  Also updated AGENT_BRIEF.md with explicit Claude/DeepSeek/Whisper/shell hand-off
  matrix and 1C/1D/1E/1F sections so any future agent (Claude / DeepSeek /
  OpenCode / OpenAI CLI) can pick up Phase 1B (music tagging) or Phase 2 (site
  build) without re-discovering the routing.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/2 (merged squash)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
